chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 757 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.152/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.118/2026 (E/A) 3. For orders on MA No.119/2026 (R/Surety) 11.02.2026 Mr. Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Muhammad Nawaz Mahesar was granted protective bail on 23.11.2016 for a period of seven days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing original solvency certificate No.271 dated 24.11.2016 issued by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Pano Akil, District Sukkur. Subsequently, the case against the accused was disposed of under ‘C’ class by learned District & Sessions Judge / Judge Anti-Terrorism Court, Sukkur vide order dated 08.12.2016, annexed with this application. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, learned Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
